imageUploader.title: Update Profile Picture
imageUploader.description: Upload a new profile image. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Max size: 5MB.

selectImage.label: Select Image
selectImage.hint: Click the camera icon or browse to select an image

invalidFileType.title: Invalid file type
invalidFileType.description: Please select an image file (JPEG, PNG, etc.)

fileTooLarge.title: File too large
fileTooLarge.description: Please select an image smaller than 5MB

noImageSelected.title: No image selected
noImageSelected.description: Please select an image to upload
